_meta.source: Community-contributed FH6 ordinal captures only. PRs welcome: add entries you have PERSONALLY verified in-game (drive the car, read the ordinal on the dashboard's Analysis page). Never copy ordinals from FH4/FH5/Motorsport tables — ordinals are not stable across titles.
_meta.format: ordinals: { "<CarOrdinal>": { "year": int, "manufacturer": str, "model": str, "trim": str?, "display_name": str? } }
